I thought the Gemini 3.5 Flash Lite response was quite telling myself. I personally like the Pelican SVG test, to me it is still a charming snapshot of model performance anecdata. No one would argue it's rigorous but I don't think it was ever intended to be.

I get people burning out on the pelican SVG test alongside the rest of the AI burnout, but I guess for myself I'm just choosing to keep enjoying it while I still can.

blocks.html_en:
I think you're underweighting the Pelican test.

Not only does it give you a super easy-to-grok understanding of the model quality just by looking at the image, but when you compare tokens and costs (both input and output), you really get a good, simple COST x QUALITY evaluation across models.

Simon explains it well: https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/16/kimi-k3/#what-can-we-l...

Simon, you should put up a summary table page that you update after every release.

sentences.en: I think you're underweighting the Pelican test.Not only does it give you a super easy-to-grok understanding of the model quality just by looking at the image, but when you compare tokens and costs (both input and output), you really get a good, simple COST x QUALITY evaluation across models.Simon explains it well: https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/16/kimi-k3/#what-can-we-l...Simon, you should put up a summary table page that you update after every release.
sentences.zh: 我认为你低估了 Pelican 测试。它不仅通过查看图像让你对模型质量有一个超级容易理解的理解，而且当你比较令牌和成本（输入和输出）时，你真的得到了一个很好的、简单的跨模型的成本 x 质量评估。Simon 解释得很好：https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/16/kimi-k3/#what-can-we-l...Simon，您应该建立一个汇总表页面，并在每次发布后更新。

blocks.html_en: Here is a different opinion. I’m always looking forward to see the pelican whenever a new model is released. Disagree. They're a nice tradition, but besides that, they're a useful way of eyeballing improvements. I realise labs are likely to be training for Pelicans - but if they're all training for them, the differences in the results are as indicative as they were before labs trained for them.

The 3.6 Flash pelican is just about the best I've seen.

blocks.html_en: Your comment reads very pedantic with a hint of jealousy. The pelican and xbox controllers are great ways to see how well it can follow direction dealing with svg a difficult format for LLMs to use and testing their spatial vision awareness.

sentences.zh: pelican 和 xbox 控制器是观察它如何遵循处理 svg 方向的好方法，svg 是法学硕士难以使用的格式，并测试他们的空间视觉意识。

blocks.html_en:
A piece of the frame is missing between pedals and back wheel. The frame of the bike passes through the bird. It also puts a cap on the bird's head, and a fish in it's mouth.

The fish and the cap where always added when I asked an llm to improve it's first attempt.

This continues the trend in LLM progress of better=more stuff

Edit: I wonder if this is a function of the reasoning training, where more tokens/ stuff is rewarded.

sentences.en: A piece of the frame is missing between pedals and back wheel.
sentences.zh: 踏板和后轮之间缺少一块框架。

sentences.en: The frame of the bike passes through the bird.
sentences.zh: 自行车的车架穿过鸟。

sentences.en: It also puts a cap on the bird's head, and a fish in it's mouth.The fish and the cap where always added when I asked an llm to improve it's first attempt.This continues the trend in LLM progress of better=more stuffEdit: I wonder if this is a function of the reasoning training, where more tokens/ stuff is rewarded.
sentences.zh: 它还在鸟的头上放了一顶帽子，在它的嘴里放一条鱼。当我要求LLM改进它的第一次尝试时，鱼和帽子总是被添加。这延续了LLM进步的更好=更多东西的趋势编辑：我想知道这是否是推理训练的一个功能，其中奖励更多的代币/东西。

blocks.html_en:
A piece of the frame is missing between pedals and back wheel. The frame of the bike passes through the bird. It also puts a cap on the bird's head, and a fish in it's mouth.

The fish and the cap where always added when I asked an llm to improve it's first attempt.

This continues the trend in LLM progress of better=more stuff

Edit: I wonder if this is a function of the reasoning training, where more tokens/ stuff is rewarded.

sentences.en: A piece of the frame is missing between pedals and back wheel.
sentences.zh: 踏板和后轮之间缺少一块框架。

sentences.en: The frame of the bike passes through the bird.
sentences.zh: 自行车的车架穿过鸟。

sentences.en: It also puts a cap on the bird's head, and a fish in it's mouth.The fish and the cap where always added when I asked an llm to improve it's first attempt.This continues the trend in LLM progress of better=more stuffEdit: I wonder if this is a function of the reasoning training, where more tokens/ stuff is rewarded.
sentences.zh: 它还在鸟的头上放了一顶帽子，在它的嘴里放一条鱼。当我要求LLM改进它的第一次尝试时，鱼和帽子总是被添加。这延续了LLM进步的更好=更多东西的趋势编辑：我想知道这是否是推理训练的一个功能，其中奖励更多的代币/东西。

blocks.html_en:
3.6 Flash would be a great model at 3.0 flash pricing. At this pricing, its thoroughly trounced by about 10 models on cost/performance including Grok 4.5. 3.5 Flash-ite would be a great model at 2.5 flash-lite pricing, as is, its trounced by many models including Deepseek v4 Flash.

As is, they are thoroughly outclassed for most usecases. I will say the one area where i do see Gemini punching above its weight class is in tasks that are effectively "Google this for me" / knowledge stuff. So it does have a role, and I do use it. So while I think Google is still in a strong position overall, they are really stuck as a tier 2 AI player right now with text models. They are tier 1 in bio, images, and video.

sentences.en: 3.6 Flash would be a great model at 3.0 flash pricing.
sentences.zh: 按照 3.0 闪存的定价，3.6 闪存将是一个很棒的型号。

sentences.en: At this pricing, its thoroughly trounced by about 10 models on cost/performance including Grok 4.5.
sentences.zh: 在这个定价下，它的性价比彻底被包括 Grok 4.5 在内的大约 10 个型号所击败。

sentences.en: 3.5 Flash-ite would be a great model at 2.5 flash-lite pricing, as is, its trounced by many models including Deepseek v4 Flash.As is, they are thoroughly outclassed for most usecases.
sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash-ite 以 2.5 flash-lite 的定价来说将是一个很棒的型号，事实上，它被包括 Deepseek v4 Flash 在内的许多型号击败。事实上，它们在大多数用例中都被彻底超越。

sentences.en: I will say the one area where i do see Gemini punching above its weight class is in tasks that are effectively "Google this for me" / knowledge stuff.
sentences.zh: 我想说的是，我确实看到双子座超越其重量级别的一个领域是有效地“为我谷歌这个”/知识内容的任务。

sentences.en: So it does have a role, and I do use it.
sentences.zh: 所以它确实有作用，而且我也确实使用它。

sentences.en: So while I think Google is still in a strong position overall, they are really stuck as a tier 2 AI player right now with text models.
sentences.zh: 因此，虽然我认为谷歌总体上仍处于强势地位，但他们目前在文本模型方面确实陷入了二级人工智能玩家的困境。

sentences.en: They are tier 1 in bio, images, and video.
sentences.zh: 它们在生物、图像和视频方面处于第一级。

blocks.html_en: 3.5 Flash was always too expensive for a "flash" model. They marketed it as "near frontier" level, but there are several order-of-magnitude cheaper open models that compete with it.

sentences.zh: 他们将其营销为“近前沿”水平，但有几种更便宜的开放型号可以与之竞争。

blocks.html_en:
In my tests, 3.6 Flash is NOT more token efficient, so it actually ends up costing more than 3.5 Flash, even with the output price reduction.

EDIT: It less less verbose in final output though, but it reasons more.

I assume the optimization comes when you have long-running tasks with many tool calls, and by reasoning more, it reduces the number of tool calls needed.

sentences.en: In my tests, 3.6 Flash is NOT more token efficient, so it actually ends up costing more than 3.5 Flash, even with the output price reduction.EDIT: It less less verbose in final output though, but it reasons more.I assume the optimization comes when you have long-running tasks with many tool calls, and by reasoning more, it reduces the number of tool calls needed.
sentences.zh: 在我的测试中，3.6 Flash 的令牌效率并不高，因此即使输出价格降低，它最终的成本也会超过 3.5 Flash。编辑：虽然最终输出的冗长程度要少一些，但它的推理更多。我假设优化是在您有许多工具调用的长时间运行任务时进行的，并且通过更多的推理，它减少了所需的工具调用数量。

blocks.html_en:
It seems that they're trying to push up-market, or at least they were.

Given the extremely competitive releases of GLM 5.2 and DeepSeek V4 (both pro and flash), I don't think there'll be appetite for it.

sentences.en: It seems that they're trying to push up-market, or at least they were.Given the extremely competitive releases of GLM 5.2 and DeepSeek V4 (both pro and flash), I don't think there'll be appetite for it.
sentences.zh: 看起来他们正试图推向高端市场，或者至少他们是这样。考虑到 GLM 5.2 和 DeepSeek V4（专业版和闪存版）的极具竞争力的版本，我认为不会有兴趣。

blocks.html_en: It seems like they're sticking to a static pricing plan that was made when the only relevant competition were the US labs (im not counting deepseek 2025 as serious competition -> glm and then kimi on the other hand, now that's a different story).

sentences.en: It seems like they're sticking to a static pricing plan that was made when the only relevant competition were the US labs (im not counting deepseek 2025 as serious competition -> glm and then kimi on the other hand, now that's a different story).

blocks.html_en: I wonder if this is a plateau towards the real pricing of AI, if you layer in gemini-2.0-flash at $0.10 / $0.70 then its a 15x price increase to 3.5/3.6 flash. But it hasnt gone up again which is interesting.

sentences.en: I wonder if this is a plateau towards the real pricing of AI, if you layer in gemini-2.0-flash at $0.10 / $0.70 then its a 15x price increase to 3.5/3.6 flash.

sentences.en: But it hasnt gone up again which is interesting.
sentences.zh: 但它并没有再次上涨，这很有趣。

blocks.html_en:
A couple tidbits:

> Beyond today’s releases, Gemini 3.5 Pro is currently testing with partners and we plan to make it broadly available as soon as it’s ready.

> We have started our most ambitious pre-training run yet, for Gemini 4, and are excited by the progress.

sentences.en: A couple tidbits:> Beyond today’s releases, Gemini 3.5 Pro is currently testing with partners and we plan to make it broadly available as soon as it’s ready.> We have started our most ambitious pre-training run yet, for Gemini 4, and are excited by the progress.
sentences.zh: 一些花絮：> 除了今天的发布之外，Gemini 3.5 Pro 目前正在与合作伙伴进行测试，我们计划在准备就绪后立即广泛提供。> 我们已经开始针对 Gemini 4 进行迄今为止最雄心勃勃的预训练，并对进展感到兴奋。

blocks.html_en:
> It’s multimodal though.

Sure.

And how does that make your day better? I know it does not improve my work in any way shape or form.

I'll take a better coding model that's not multi-modal any time.

If I need an LLM to do images or sound, I'd rather use a dedicated one instead of a jack-of-all-trades-master-of-none model.

sentences.en: > It’s multimodal though.Sure.And how does that make your day better?
sentences.zh: > 虽然它是多式联运的。当然。这如何让您的一天变得更好？

sentences.en: I know it does not improve my work in any way shape or form.I'll take a better coding model that's not multi-modal any time.If I need an LLM to do images or sound, I'd rather use a dedicated one instead of a jack-of-all-trades-master-of-none model.
sentences.zh: 我知道它不会以任何方式改善我的工作。我会随时采用一种更好的非多模态编码模型。如果我需要法学硕士来处理图像或声音，我宁愿使用专用的模型，而不是万事通的模型。

blocks.html_en:
Personally, I often paste screenshots into Claude Code of the application it’s working on. And I’ve even had it work autonomously on something and regularly grab its own screenshots.

Or sometimes I will have tables, charts, or even screenshots of text that I would otherwise have to have another step to OCR or type out.

Multimodal saves me time on a regular basis. Not sure it’s a game changer, but just lets me communicate with the model in all sorts of ways that would be harder otherwise.

sentences.en: Personally, I often paste screenshots into Claude Code of the application it’s working on.
sentences.zh: 就我个人而言，我经常将屏幕截图粘贴到正在处理的应用程序的 Claude Code 中。

sentences.en: And I’ve even had it work autonomously on something and regularly grab its own screenshots.Or sometimes I will have tables, charts, or even screenshots of text that I would otherwise have to have another step to OCR or type out.Multimodal saves me time on a regular basis.
sentences.zh: 我什至让它在某些事情上自主工作，并定期抓取自己的屏幕截图。或者有时我会有表格、图表，甚至是文本屏幕截图，否则我必须再进行 OCR 或输入步骤。多模式定期为我节省时间。

sentences.en: Not sure it’s a game changer, but just lets me communicate with the model in all sorts of ways that would be harder otherwise.
sentences.zh: 不确定它是否会改变游戏规则，但只是让我以各种方式与模型进行交流，否则会更困难。

sentences.zh: 就我个人而言，我经常将屏幕截图粘贴到正在处理的应用程序的 Claude Code 中。

sentences.en: And I’ve even had it work autonomously on something and regularly grab its own screenshots.
sentences.zh: 我什至让它在某些事情上自主工作并定期抓取自己的屏幕截图。

blocks.html_en: Or sometimes I will have tables, charts, or even screenshots of text that I would otherwise have to have another step to OCR or type out.

blocks.html_en: Multimodal saves me time on a regular basis. Not sure it’s a game changer, but just lets me communicate with the model in all sorts of ways that would be harder otherwise.

sentences.en: Multimodal saves me time on a regular basis.
sentences.zh: 多式联运定期为我节省时间。

sentences.en: Not sure it’s a game changer, but just lets me communicate with the model in all sorts of ways that would be harder otherwise.
sentences.zh: 不确定它是否会改变游戏规则，但只是让我以各种方式与模型进行交流，否则会更困难。

blocks.html_en:
It'd be interesting to know how much the Intelligence as a Service angle serves as a value-add in the minds of Google's executives.

You can get decent open-weight models now. That's not difficult. The difficulty is 1) running them and 2) compliance.

My company runs Claude on GCP's Vertex AI solution. We're in the US healthcare IT space, so the models need to be from somewhere that American healthcare agencies and companies have traditionally been okay with sourcing code from - which means the US, Canada, and maybe Europe. The stuff that handles PHI/PII must be in the US. The expense of hosting is more of a PITA than most customers want to go through this early in the technology's lifecycle, and intelligence gains are simply a matter of degree for most business tasks.

In theory, we could find some open-weight model (likely from China) for our development agentic work and host it anywhere you can host AI models. We don't, though, and I think Google, OpenAI/Microsoft, and Anthropic see that as the core of their business.

sentences.en: It'd be interesting to know how much the Intelligence as a Service angle serves as a value-add in the minds of Google's executives.You can get decent open-weight models now.
sentences.zh: 了解智能即服务角度在 Google 高管心目中的增值作用有多大，这会很有趣。现在您可以获得不错的开放权重模型。

sentences.en: That's not difficult.
sentences.zh: 那并不难。

sentences.en: The difficulty is 1) running them and 2) compliance.My company runs Claude on GCP's Vertex AI solution.
sentences.zh: 困难在于 1) 运行它们，2) 合规性。我的公司在 GCP 的 Vertex AI 解决方案上运行 Claude。

sentences.en: We're in the US healthcare IT space, so the models need to be from somewhere that American healthcare agencies and companies have traditionally been okay with sourcing code from - which means the US, Canada, and maybe Europe.
sentences.zh: 我们处于美国医疗保健 IT 领域，因此模型必须来自美国医疗保健机构和公司传统上可以接受源代码的地方 - 这意味着美国、加拿大，也许还有欧洲。

sentences.en: The stuff that handles PHI/PII must be in the US.
sentences.zh: 处理 PHI/PII 的人员必须在美国。

sentences.en: The expense of hosting is more of a PITA than most customers want to go through this early in the technology's lifecycle, and intelligence gains are simply a matter of degree for most business tasks.In theory, we could find some open-weight model (likely from China) for our development agentic work and host it anywhere you can host AI models.
sentences.zh: 托管费用比大多数客户希望在技术生命周期的早期经历的费用更像是 PITA，而对于大多数业务任务来说，情报增益只是程度问题。理论上，我们可以为我们的开发代理工作找到一些开放权重模型（可能来自中国），并将其托管在任何可以托管 AI 模型的地方。

sentences.en: We don't, though, and I think Google, OpenAI/Microsoft, and Anthropic see that as the core of their business.
sentences.zh: 但我们不这么认为，我认为 Google、OpenAI/Microsoft 和 Anthropic 都将其视为其业务的核心。

blocks.html_en:
It's scary relying on Google's models.

I have a very price sensitive workload that used to run on flash 2.5 lite - it's deprecated now.

The replacement 3.1 flash lite is a lot more expensive, but now also has a sunset date.

3.5 flash lite is even more expensive.

So the price is rising and you have no choice but to keep paying more and more.

sentences.en: It's scary relying on Google's models.I have a very price sensitive workload that used to run on flash 2.5 lite - it's deprecated now.The replacement 3.1 flash lite is a lot more expensive, but now also has a sunset date.3.5 flash lite is even more expensive.So the price is rising and you have no choice but to keep paying more and more.
sentences.zh: 依靠 Google 的模型是很可怕的。我有一个对价格非常敏感的工作负载，以前在 flash 2.5 lite 上运行 - 现在已弃用。替换的 3.1 flash lite 贵很多，但现在也有日落日期。3.5 flash lite 甚至更贵。所以价格在上涨，你别无选择，只能继续支付越来越多的费用。

blocks.html_en:
I just put the varying parameters in a trailer prompt and have them change every time. It doesn’t matter because the cache is prefix keyed. You lose caching for the last 20 tokens or so but that’s not a big deal. Moving it to a tool call makes it too slow (needs full roundtrip).

If you’re constructing the prompt you don’t have to jam everything together you can arrange it appropriately.

sentences.en: I just put the varying parameters in a trailer prompt and have them change every time.
sentences.zh: 我只是将不同的参数放入预告片提示中，并让它们每次都更改。

sentences.en: It doesn’t matter because the cache is prefix keyed.
sentences.zh: 这并不重要，因为缓存是前缀键控的。

sentences.en: You lose caching for the last 20 tokens or so but that’s not a big deal.
sentences.zh: 您会丢失最后 20 个左右令牌的缓存，但这并不是什么大问题。

sentences.en: Moving it to a tool call makes it too slow (needs full roundtrip).If you’re constructing the prompt you don’t have to jam everything together you can arrange it appropriately.
sentences.zh: 将其移至工具调用会使其太慢（需要完整的往返）。如果您正在构建提示，则不必将所有内容都塞在一起，您可以适当地安排它。

blocks.html_en:
Not an open source, but I discuss it in my book with examples for OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini, https://crimede-coder.com/blogposts/2026/LLMsForMortals.

All of the models, you need to have a consistent input to get the cache hit. So if you are chatting with a document, and change the system prompt, it will be a cache miss, even if the rest of the items are all the same. If you even pass in the document in not the same order as the prompts, it will be a cache miss. Or if you add tool calls or structured outputs, it will be a cache miss. (Since those generally go at the beginning of the prompt call, not at the end.)

Most of the time when reading documents from URLs directly it will never cache. (Need to typically pass in the bytes directly, or use the provider document store index.)

Gemini has a 4096 minimum token size with the 3 version models before even getting a cache hit. OpenAI it is lower (1024), and is automatic, but only happens in increments of 124. Anthropic can also get cache hits at 1024 tokens, but you need to explicit ask for it (and pay extra).

Caching by default typically lives for 5 minutes since the last cache hit across providers. But some of them you can ask for longer. AWS for Anthropic models can be tricky with multiple endpoint routing, so can get cache misses if it happens to route to a different endpoint.

sentences.en: Not an open source, but I discuss it in my book with examples for OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini, https://crimede-coder.com/blogposts/2026/LLMsForMortals.All of the models, you need to have a consistent input to get the cache hit.
sentences.zh: 不是开源的，但我在我的书中以 OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini 的示例进行了讨论，https://crimede-coder.com/blogposts/2026/LLMsForMortals。所有模型，您都需要有一致的输入才能获得缓存命中。

sentences.en: So if you are chatting with a document, and change the system prompt, it will be a cache miss, even if the rest of the items are all the same.
sentences.zh: 因此，如果您正在与文档聊天，并且更改了系统提示，则即使其余项目都相同，这也将是缓存未命中。

sentences.en: If you even pass in the document in not the same order as the prompts, it will be a cache miss.
sentences.zh: 如果你甚至以与提示的顺序不同的顺序传入文档，那么这将是缓存未命中。

sentences.en: Or if you add tool calls or structured outputs, it will be a cache miss.
sentences.zh: 或者，如果添加工具调用或结构化输出，这将是缓存未命中。

sentences.en: (Since those generally go at the beginning of the prompt call, not at the end.)Most of the time when reading documents from URLs directly it will never cache.
sentences.zh: （因为这些通常出现在提示调用的开头，而不是结尾。）大多数情况下，直接从 URL 读取文档时，它永远不会缓存。

sentences.en: (Need to typically pass in the bytes directly, or use the provider document store index.)Gemini has a 4096 minimum token size with the 3 version models before even getting a cache hit.
sentences.zh: （通常需要直接传递字节，或使用提供程序文档存储索引。）Gemini 在获得缓存命中之前，3 个版本模型的最小令牌大小为 4096。

sentences.en: OpenAI it is lower (1024), and is automatic, but only happens in increments of 124.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 较低 (1024)，并且是自动的，但仅以 124 为增量发生。

sentences.en: Anthropic can also get cache hits at 1024 tokens, but you need to explicit ask for it (and pay extra).Caching by default typically lives for 5 minutes since the last cache hit across providers.
sentences.zh: Anthropic 还可以获得 1024 个令牌的缓存命中，但您需要明确请求（并支付额外费用）。默认情况下，自上次跨提供商的缓存命中以来，缓存通常会保留 5 分钟。

sentences.en: But some of them you can ask for longer.
sentences.zh: 但有些你可以要求更长的时间。

sentences.en: AWS for Anthropic models can be tricky with multiple endpoint routing, so can get cache misses if it happens to route to a different endpoint.
sentences.zh: AWS for Anthropic 模型在处理多个端点路由时可能会很棘手，因此如果它碰巧路由到不同的端点，则可能会导致缓存未命中。

blocks.html_en:
Not an open source, but I discuss it in my book with examples for OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini, https://crimede-coder.com/blogposts/2026/LLMsForMortals.

All of the models, you need to have a consistent input to get the cache hit. So if you are chatting with a document, and change the system prompt, it will be a cache miss, even if the rest of the items are all the same. If you even pass in the document in not the same order as the prompts, it will be a cache miss. Or if you add tool calls or structured outputs, it will be a cache miss. (Since those generally go at the beginning of the prompt call, not at the end.)

Most of the time when reading documents from URLs directly it will never cache. (Need to typically pass in the bytes directly, or use the provider document store index.)

Gemini has a 4096 minimum token size with the 3 version models before even getting a cache hit. OpenAI it is lower (1024), and is automatic, but only happens in increments of 124. Anthropic can also get cache hits at 1024 tokens, but you need to explicit ask for it (and pay extra).

Caching by default typically lives for 5 minutes since the last cache hit across providers. But some of them you can ask for longer. AWS for Anthropic models can be tricky with multiple endpoint routing, so can get cache misses if it happens to route to a different endpoint.

blocks.html_en:
That’s part of why, since Firebase, I’ve tried to never depend on Google products for business, especially not GCP.

Features stay in Beta for ages, whatever that actually means, and released ones get deprecated things fast.

Where some of the competitions treats deprecating entire services as "let’s not put it on your frontpage, put deprecation notices all over the doc, and politely ask new users not to start new project with them".

sentences.en: That’s part of why, since Firebase, I’ve tried to never depend on Google products for business, especially not GCP.Features stay in Beta for ages, whatever that actually means, and released ones get deprecated things fast.Where some of the competitions treats deprecating entire services as "let’s not put it on your frontpage, put deprecation notices all over the doc, and politely ask new users not to start new project with them".
sentences.zh: 这就是为什么自 Firebase 以来，我一直试图永远不要依赖 Google 产品进行业务，尤其是 GCP。功能在 Beta 版中停留了很长时间，无论这实际上意味着什么，而发布的功能很快就会被弃用。有些竞赛将弃用整个服务视为“我们不要将其放在首页上，在文档中到处放弃用通知，并礼貌地要求新用户不要使用它们启动新项目”。

blocks.html_en:
its not always that simple. dropping in a new model is trivial, but highly specific workflows may rely on specific _invisible_ aspects of a model. when that model gets deprecated, the workflow needs to be rebuilt/re-tuned to work with a different model.

google's inability or unwillingness to provide stable timelines for model deprecation makes it risky to build complex workflows using their models

sentences.en: its not always that simple.

sentences.en: dropping in a new model is trivial, but highly specific workflows may rely on specific _invisible_ aspects of a model.
sentences.zh: 放入新模型是微不足道的，但高度特定的工作流程可能依赖于模型的特定_不可见_方面。

sentences.en: when that model gets deprecated, the workflow needs to be rebuilt/re-tuned to work with a different model.google's inability or unwillingness to provide stable timelines for model deprecation makes it risky to build complex workflows using their models
sentences.zh: 当该模型被弃用时，需要重建/重新调整工作流程以使用不同的模型。Google 无法或不愿意为模型弃用提供稳定的时间表，这使得使用其模型构建复杂的工作流程存在风险

blocks.html_en:
You would be surprised how much of a difference the model makes for certain niche tasks.

For my use case, `gemini-3.1-flash-lite` is ~20% higher accuracy than the next best model of comparable cost (considering both proprietary and open-weight alternatives)

sentences.en: You would be surprised how much of a difference the model makes for certain niche tasks.For my use case, `gemini-3.1-flash-lite` is ~20% higher accuracy than the next best model of comparable cost (considering both proprietary and open-weight alternatives)
sentences.zh: 您会惊讶地发现该模型对某些利基任务产生了多大的影响。对于我的用例，“gemini-3.1-flash-lite”的准确度比同等成本的下一个最佳模型高出约 20%（考虑专有和开放权重替代方案）

blocks.html_en:
Well it is a bit surprising that 3.1 flash-lite could be better than deepseek-v4-pro (cheaper output and way cheaper cache so might cost less for quite a few use cases).

They are not anywhere close according to pretty much every benchmark (even v4-flash is considerably ahead and its way cheaper than flash-lite). Maybe tuning prompts/tools/etc. might be useful?

sentences.en: Well it is a bit surprising that 3.1 flash-lite could be better than deepseek-v4-pro (cheaper output and way cheaper cache so might cost less for quite a few use cases).They are not anywhere close according to pretty much every benchmark (even v4-flash is considerably ahead and its way cheaper than flash-lite).
sentences.zh: 嗯，有点令人惊讶的是 3.1 flash-lite 可能比 deepseek-v4-pro 更好（更便宜的输出和更便宜的缓存，因此对于相当多的用例来说可能成本更低）。根据几乎每个基准测试，它们都不是很接近（甚至 v4-flash 也相当领先，而且比 flash-lite 便宜得多）。

sentences.en: Maybe tuning prompts/tools/etc. might be useful?
sentences.zh: 也许调整提示/工具/等等。可能有用吗？

blocks.html_en:
I felt the same way about openai's text-davinci-002 and code-davinci-002 (gpt-3.5). They were amazing completion models and openai basically dumped them with no equal cost or equal performance replacement. Instead all their models are opaque with no ability to work in completion mode where one actually controls the text input to the model.

These days no company even has completion models where one controls the text input fully. Worthless.

sentences.en: I felt the same way about openai's text-davinci-002 and code-davinci-002 (gpt-3.5).
sentences.zh: 我对 openai 的 text-davinci-002 和 code-davinci-002 (gpt-3.5) 也有同样的感觉。

sentences.en: They were amazing completion models and openai basically dumped them with no equal cost or equal performance replacement.
sentences.zh: 它们是令人惊叹的完成模型，而 openai 基本上抛弃了它们，没有同等成本或同等性能的替代品。

sentences.en: Instead all their models are opaque with no ability to work in completion mode where one actually controls the text input to the model.These days no company even has completion models where one controls the text input fully.
sentences.zh: 相反，他们的所有模型都是不透明的，无法在补全模式下工作，在补全模式下，人们实际上控制着模型的文本输入。如今，没有一家公司甚至拥有完全控制文本输入的补全模型。

sentences.en: Worthless.
sentences.zh: 一文不值。

blocks.html_en: Man I love Gemini models but these kind of pricing increase is just insanse. I have a little product and I have to keep increasing the price and reduce the limits because of this non-sense, and they did not even let us use the old models in near future, so I forced to update to the new model with basically no to little improvement because I don't even need that much. Google if you can read this, it okay to release new models and change the price for them, but please please don't kill the old ones like gemini-2.5-flash-lite, because that all I ever need for my little apps with only few thousands of users.

sentences.zh: 谷歌，如果你能读到这篇文章，发布新型号并改变它们的价格是可以的，但请不要杀死像gemini-2.5-flash-lite这样的旧型号，因为我只需要几千个用户的小应用程序就可以了。

What is your use case?

Have you considered moving to open source / Chinese models?

If gemini-2.5-flash-lite is good enough for your application, you will find even lower cost options with better performance outside of the Google ecosystem.

blocks.html_en:
Do not base products on models that are not open-weights. Doing it is like building a product on someone else's platform, you are entirely at their mercy, and even when they don't have any reason to hurt you, you are tiny enough that if any policy they want to enact hurts you as a side effect, no-one is going to care.

You don't have to self-host the open-weights model, you just need to be able to source it from multiple providers.

Using the closed vendor models maybe made sense when open-weight models lagged so far behind, but that time is now gone.

sentences.en: Do not base products on models that are not open-weights.
sentences.zh: 请勿将产品基于非开放重量的模型。

sentences.en: Doing it is like building a product on someone else's platform, you are entirely at their mercy, and even when they don't have any reason to hurt you, you are tiny enough that if any policy they want to enact hurts you as a side effect, no-one is going to care.You don't have to self-host the open-weights model, you just need to be able to source it from multiple providers.Using the closed vendor models maybe made sense when open-weight models lagged so far behind, but that time is now gone.
sentences.zh: 这样做就像在别人的平台上构建产品一样，你完全受到他们的摆布，即使他们没有任何理由伤害你，你也足够小，如果他们想要制定的任何政策作为副作用伤害你，没有人会在乎。你不必自行托管开放权重模型，你只需要能够从多个提供商处获取它。当开放权重模型远远落后时，使用封闭的供应商模型可能是有意义的，但那现在时间已经过去了。

blocks.html_en: Why don't you just switch to cheaper models? I'm sure DeepSeek is probably enough for you and it's way cheaper. If you want, host your own (or have someone else host) open weight models, I use both embedded and cloud Gemma for some things.

sentences.en: Why don't you just switch to cheaper models?

sentences.en: I'm sure DeepSeek is probably enough for you and it's way cheaper.
sentences.zh: 我确信 DeepSeek 可能足以满足您的需求，而且价格也便宜得多。

sentences.en: If you want, host your own (or have someone else host) open weight models, I use both embedded and cloud Gemma for some things.
sentences.zh: 如果您愿意，托管您自己的（或让其他人托管）开放权重模型，我会同时使用嵌入式和云 Gemma 来处理某些事情。

blocks.html_en:
No word about updating Jules, which is still stuck on 3.1 Pro. I get that it's probably niche but I've really appreciated basically being able to give directions to Jules on my phone, then reviewing and merging a GitHub PR fifteen minutes later. It's been great for getting some progress in on a few personal projects during my commute when I can't exactly pull out my laptop.

Anyone have any good alternatives?

blocks.html_en:
Both Claude and Codex can code in the cloud, it works quite well!

I tested Jules and while the idea is good in theory, I found the model's intelligence to be very lackluster.

sentences.en: Both Claude and Codex can code in the cloud, it works quite well!I tested Jules and while the idea is good in theory, I found the model's intelligence to be very lackluster.
sentences.zh: Claude 和 Codex 都可以在云端编码，效果相当好！我测试了 Jules，虽然这个想法在理论上很好，但我发现模型的智能非常乏善可陈。

blocks.html_en: Shame. I'm on the $20/mo Gemini Pro plan because the 5tb of cloud storage and the youtube premium lite were good enough perks, and my coding complexity needs were light enough for me to overlook Claude or Codex. But Antigravity is working better than Jules and it's basically giving me a taste of what I'm missing and it's harder to justify not trying out the competitors.

blocks.html_en:
I have no affiliations with the team or product, but Superconductor reminded me of Jules when I tried it a couple of months ago.

It might be overkill features-wise, but there's a free tier and it likely won't be left for dead anytime soon.

blocks.html_en: Wow - Google does not even bother to show benchmarks of these models compared to the frontier and Chinese labs - only against previous versions. I'm not surprised. Having worked there for years it was amazing just how inwardly looking the company is.

sentences.zh: 哇 - 谷歌甚至懒得展示这些模型与前沿和中国实验室相比的基准 - 仅与以前的版本进行比较。

blocks.html_en:
The mention of an "ambitious" gemini 4 pre-train signals to me that 3.5 pro is probably a lost cause.

That being said, it seems that Gemini is still the best image analysis model, so hopefully 3.6 flash builds on this even more.

sentences.en: The mention of an "ambitious" gemini 4 pre-train signals to me that 3.5 pro is probably a lost cause.That being said, it seems that Gemini is still the best image analysis model, so hopefully 3.6 flash builds on this even more.
sentences.zh: 提到“雄心勃勃”的 Gemini 4 预训练向我表明 3.5 pro 可能是一个失败的原因。话虽如此，Gemini 似乎仍然是最好的图像分析模型，所以希望 3.6 flash 能够在此基础上进一步发展。

blocks.html_en: Not for me personally. While setting up a custom website, 3.5 Flash introduced tons of bugs that Claude had to fix. The website has about 3,000 lines of code spread across multiple files, and Gemini somehow couldn't do frontend changes without breaking things. Sharing my 2c, but I've stayed on GPT 5.5+ and Claude Sonnet/Opus 4.6+. Anything past that from those two have been bug-free, but Google's latest hasn't been.

sentences.en: Not for me personally.
sentences.zh: 不适合我个人。

sentences.en: While setting up a custom website, 3.5 Flash introduced tons of bugs that Claude had to fix.
sentences.zh: 在设置自定义网站时，3.5 Flash 引入了克劳德必须修复的大量错误。

sentences.en: The website has about 3,000 lines of code spread across multiple files, and Gemini somehow couldn't do frontend changes without breaking things.
sentences.zh: 该网站有大约 3,000 行代码分布在多个文件中，而 Gemini 不知何故无法在不破坏内容的情况下进行前端更改。

sentences.en: Sharing my 2c, but I've stayed on GPT 5.5+ and Claude Sonnet/Opus 4.6+.
sentences.zh: 分享我的 2c，但我仍然使用 GPT 5.5+ 和 Claude Sonnet/Opus 4.6+。

sentences.en: Anything past that from those two have been bug-free, but Google's latest hasn't been.
sentences.zh: 这两者之后的任何内容都没有错误，但谷歌的最新版本却并非如此。

blocks.html_en:
Google seems to have anorexia when it comes to model intelligence. They have an internal hard constraint on price per token it seems, and they are trying to squeeze out intelligence with limited compute.

I wonder if there is something with their TPU cycles that makes them want to postpone training a new model. My guess is that they have been on the same base model for 6 months and they may have waited for the next gen TPUs to train Gemini 4, which greatly limits how much intelligence they can increase and forces them to do cost efficiency increases.

sentences.en: Google seems to have anorexia when it comes to model intelligence.
sentences.zh: 谷歌似乎对模型智能厌食症。

sentences.en: They have an internal hard constraint on price per token it seems, and they are trying to squeeze out intelligence with limited compute.I wonder if there is something with their TPU cycles that makes them want to postpone training a new model.
sentences.zh: 他们似乎对每个代币的价格有一个内部硬性约束，并且他们试图用有限的计算来挤出智能。我想知道他们的 TPU 周期是否有某些东西让他们想要推迟训练新模型。

sentences.en: My guess is that they have been on the same base model for 6 months and they may have waited for the next gen TPUs to train Gemini 4, which greatly limits how much intelligence they can increase and forces them to do cost efficiency increases.
sentences.zh: 我的猜测是，他们已经在同一个基础模型上使用了 6 个月，他们可能一直在等待下一代 TPU 来训练 Gemini 4，这极大地限制了他们可以增加的智能程度，并迫使他们提高成本效率。

blocks.html_en: It's interesting to see a competitive landscape shift out from under the early adopters. Anthropic appears to have anticipated this, but everyone else is going to get caught out by the major platform providers' multitude of distribution channels and use cases. Meta might also be an exceptional case if they can find a way to goose up ad effectiveness.

sentences.en: It's interesting to see a competitive landscape shift out from under the early adopters.
sentences.zh: 有趣的是，竞争格局从早期采用者的统治下发生了转变。

sentences.en: Anthropic appears to have anticipated this, but everyone else is going to get caught out by the major platform providers' multitude of distribution channels and use cases.
sentences.zh: Anthropic 似乎已经预料到了这一点，但其他所有人都会被主要平台提供商的众多分销渠道和用例所困扰。

sentences.en: Meta might also be an exceptional case if they can find a way to goose up ad effectiveness.
sentences.zh: 如果 Meta 能够找到提高广告效果的方法，那么他们也可能是一个例外。

blocks.html_en:
> Could it be that they have to serve their models to billions of users?

And how is that different from their competitors exactly?

blocks.html_en:
It's probably a mix of things but I do think they are viewing "edge AI" as their strategic play: on-device, small efficient models (Android / iOS) and instant AI summaries in google search etc. So all of their focus is on delivering strong performance in a compute constrained environment.

I do think it's still also simultaneously true that they have an actual problem with competing with current frontier progress. It's just that has gone from an existential threat to something they are willing to defer addressing because they see the long game for them sitting at the smaller end.

sentences.en: It's probably a mix of things but I do think they are viewing "edge AI" as their strategic play: on-device, small efficient models (Android / iOS) and instant AI summaries in google search etc. So all of their focus is on delivering strong performance in a compute constrained environment.I do think it's still also simultaneously true that they have an actual problem with competing with current frontier progress.
sentences.zh: 这可能是多种因素的结合，但我确实认为他们正在将“边缘人工智能”视为他们的战略策略：设备上的小型高效模型（Android / iOS）和谷歌搜索中的即时人工智能摘要等。因此，他们所有的重点都是在计算受限的环境中提供强大的性能。我确实认为他们在与当前前沿进展竞争方面仍然存在实际问题。

sentences.en: It's just that has gone from an existential threat to something they are willing to defer addressing because they see the long game for them sitting at the smaller end.
sentences.zh: 只是这已经从一个存在的威胁变成了他们愿意推迟解决的问题，因为他们看到了他们坐在较小一端的长期游戏。

blocks.html_en:
Google has not changed. Following two facts are like tautologies by now.

1. Their AI efforts are very fundamental research oriented. They are really good at it.

2. Their productization sucks. The end products gets little attention compared to competition. It can be canceled at any time. You should never build anything around Google only APIs, AI or not.

sentences.en: Google has not changed.
sentences.zh: 谷歌没有改变。

sentences.en: Following two facts are like tautologies by now.1.
sentences.zh: 以下两个事实现在就像同义反复：1。

sentences.en: Their AI efforts are very fundamental research oriented.
sentences.zh: 他们的人工智能工作非常注重基础研究。

sentences.en: They are really good at it.2.
sentences.zh: 他们真的很擅长。2。

sentences.en: Their productization sucks.
sentences.zh: 他们的产品化很糟糕。

sentences.en: The end products gets little attention compared to competition.
sentences.zh: 与竞争对手相比，最终产品很少受到关注。

sentences.en: It can be canceled at any time.
sentences.zh: 它可以随时取消。

sentences.en: You should never build anything around Google only APIs, AI or not.
sentences.zh: 你永远不应该围绕 Google 专有的 API 构建任何东西，无论是否是人工智能。

blocks.html_en: I have a side business selling custom fingerprint jewelry and I use gemini nano banana to clean up customer submitted fingerprint images. This was a step I used to do by hand at 10 - 15 minutes per image and nano banana is the first model that is able to do the task (it is astonishingly good at it). I can't wait to see what the next nano banana can do, hopefully its released soon.

sentences.en: I have a side business selling custom fingerprint jewelry and I use gemini nano banana to clean up customer submitted fingerprint images.

sentences.en: I can't wait to see what the next nano banana can do, hopefully its released soon.
sentences.zh: 我迫不及待地想看看下一个纳米香蕉能做什么，希望它很快就能发布。

blocks.html_en:
Their naming scheme is confusing. Branding has never been Google's strong suit and their marketing copy is pretty bottom-of-the-barrel[0]. Anthropic has a pretty clear set of models but Gemini decided to rebrand their Flash as Flash Lite (and presumably the future will see a Flash Lite Mini, a Flash Lite Mini Nano and a Flash Lite Mini Nano 3B) which confuses the pricing to high hell.

This plus the Vertex, AI Studio, Gemini, Antigravity. It's honestly too confusing to use. I need to use Gemini just to decide on which platform and which model to consider.

0: Famous Kurian Tweet: "We're announcing Duet AI for Google Workspace will now be Gemini for Google Workspace. Consumers and organizations of all sizes can access Gemini across the Workspace apps they know and love. We're introducing a new offering called Gemini Business, which lets organizations use generative AI in Workspace at a lower price point than Gemini Enterprise, which replaces Duet AI for Workspace Enterprise."

sentences.en: Their naming scheme is confusing.

blocks.html_en:
Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite has been my go to for cheap document processing at scale (especially with 50% off batch mode), but they are really boiling the frog with pricing increases with each version:

gemini-2.5-flash-lite: $0.10 input / $0.40 output

gemini-3.1-flash-lite: $0.25 input / $1.50 output

gemini-3.5-flash-lite: $0.30 input / $2.50 output (a 6.25x increase over 2.5!)

Now watch them deprecate Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite in the coming months...

sentences.en: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite has been my go to for cheap document processing at scale (especially with 50% off batch mode), but they are really boiling the frog with pricing increases with each version:gemini-2.5-flash-lite: $0.10 input / $0.40 outputgemini-3.1-flash-lite: $0.25 input / $1.50 outputgemini-3.5-flash-lite: $0.30 input / $2.50 output (a 6.25x increase over 2.5!)Now watch them deprecate Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite in the coming months...
sentences.zh: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite 一直是我大规模廉价文档处理的首选（尤其是批处理模式可享受 50% 折扣），但每个版本的价格都在上涨，它们确实是在煮青蛙：gemini-2.5-flash-lite：0.10 美元输入/0.40 美元输出gemini-3.1-flash-lite：0.25 美元输入/1.50 美元输出gemini-3.5-flash-lite：0.30 美元输入/ 2.50 美元的产出（比 2.5 增加了 6.25 倍！）现在看看他们在未来几个月内弃用 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite...

blocks.html_en: DeepSWE and FrontierCode are more realistic if you read up on what they actually measure. But the most realistic is to try it yourself. Benchmarks can only vaguely represent typical usage, and how you judge the result. Giving the same real task you have to a few models will make you understand them better than chasing benchmarks.

sentences.en: DeepSWE and FrontierCode are more realistic if you read up on what they actually measure.
sentences.zh: 如果您仔细阅读 DeepSWE 和 FrontierCode 的实际测量结果，您会发现它们更加现实。

sentences.en: But the most realistic is to try it yourself.
sentences.zh: 但最现实的还是自己去尝试。

sentences.en: Benchmarks can only vaguely represent typical usage, and how you judge the result.
sentences.zh: 基准只能模糊地代表典型用法以及您如何判断结果。

sentences.en: Giving the same real task you have to a few models will make you understand them better than chasing benchmarks.
sentences.zh: 将相同的实际任务交给几个模型将使您比追逐基准更好地理解它们。

blocks.html_en: DeepSWE and FrontierCode are more realistic if you read up on what they actually measure. But the most realistic is to try it yourself. Benchmarks can only vaguely represent typical usage, and how you judge the result. Giving the same real task you have to a few models will make you understand them better than chasing benchmarks.

blocks.html_en:
Could be a good tradeoff for the flash model though. 3.5 -> 3.6 is a tiny bit cheaper and maybe faster?

artificialanalysis.ai has it going from 165 tps -> 304 tps. openrouter.ai needs more data but it has it going from ~100 tps -> ~150 tps, though at peak 3.5 has reached 156tps.

sentences.en: Could be a good tradeoff for the flash model though.
sentences.zh: 不过对于闪存模型来说可能是一个很好的权衡。

blocks.html_en:
In other good news "the model has been trained to minimize refusals for beneficial uses.".

Otherwise, this news feels like a tiny incremental improvement on Gemini Flash series to make it more efficient with token usage, subagent and cost. Nothing big.

Regarding their benchmark scores on CyberGym, I wonder why they didn't compare their 3.5 Flash Cyber model with Fable 5. I mean they included Mythos and GPT-Cyber, so why not Fable 5 too?

They also mentioned Gemini 3.5 Pro is in testing and its about to become available very soon. Another thing maybe worth discussing is the announcement of pre-training Gemini 4. Sadly, not much technical details to discuss on. Many comments in here seem to mostly be about how Google is behind the others, but honestly, is it really worth the investment to be #1 in Artifical Analysis every week?

sentences.en: In other good news "the model has been trained to minimize refusals for beneficial uses.".Otherwise, this news feels like a tiny incremental improvement on Gemini Flash series to make it more efficient with token usage, subagent and cost.
sentences.zh: 其他好消息是“该模型已经过训练，可以最大限度地减少对有益用途的拒绝。”。否则，这个消息感觉就像是 Gemini Flash 系列的一个微小的增量改进，使其在代币使用、子代理和成本方面更加高效。

sentences.en: Nothing big.Regarding their benchmark scores on CyberGym, I wonder why they didn't compare their 3.5 Flash Cyber model with Fable 5.
sentences.zh: 没什么大不了的。关于他们在 Cyber​​Gym 上的基准分数，我想知道他们为什么不将 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 模型与《神鬼寓言 5》进行比较。

sentences.en: I mean they included Mythos and GPT-Cyber, so why not Fable 5 too?They also mentioned Gemini 3.5 Pro is in testing and its about to become available very soon.
sentences.zh: 我的意思是他们包括了 Mythos 和 GPT-Cyber​​，那么为什么不包括《神鬼寓言 5》呢？他们还提到 Gemini 3.5 Pro 正在测试中，即将推出。

sentences.en: Another thing maybe worth discussing is the announcement of pre-training Gemini 4.
sentences.zh: 另一件值得讨论的事情是 Gemini 4 预训练的宣布。

sentences.en: Sadly, not much technical details to discuss on.
sentences.zh: 遗憾的是，没有太多技术细节可供讨论。

sentences.en: Many comments in here seem to mostly be about how Google is behind the others, but honestly, is it really worth the investment to be #1 in Artifical Analysis every week?
sentences.zh: 这里的许多评论似乎主要是关于谷歌如何落后于其他人，但说实话，每周在人工分析领域排名第一真的值得投资吗？

blocks.html_en:
It is 17% more token-efficient than 3.5 and performs significantly better in coding and tool usage benchmarks.

It is also cheaper than 3.5:

> This enhanced efficiency is also combined with a lower price than 3.5 Flash. At $1.50/1M input tokens and $7.50/1M output tokens, 3.6 Flash reduces the overall cost per agentic task, making agents more cost-effective to build and run.

sentences.en: It is 17% more token-efficient than 3.5 and performs significantly better in coding and tool usage benchmarks.It is also cheaper than 3.5:> This enhanced efficiency is also combined with a lower price than 3.5 Flash.
sentences.zh: 它的令牌效率比 3.5 高 17%，并且在编码和工具使用基准测试中表现明显更好。它也比 3.5 更便宜：> 这种增强的效率还与比 3.5 Flash 更低的价格相结合。

sentences.en: At $1.50/1M input tokens and $7.50/1M output tokens, 3.6 Flash reduces the overall cost per agentic task, making agents more cost-effective to build and run.

blocks.html_en:
Google really needs to get their product strategy together. The discontinued gemini-cli and introduced antigravity-cli which is a downgrade IMO and the sooner they can partner up with AWS and release the gemini models via Bedrock the easier corporate/business which has strict data protection rules can use their models and make them available for internal engineers.

It's a one thing to research and improve the model, but if they ignore the ease of access and multi-availability of their models in different ways they are going to fall behind again.

sentences.en: Google really needs to get their product strategy together.
sentences.zh: 谷歌确实需要整合他们的产品策略。

sentences.en: The discontinued gemini-cli and introduced antigravity-cli which is a downgrade IMO and the sooner they can partner up with AWS and release the gemini models via Bedrock the easier corporate/business which has strict data protection rules can use their models and make them available for internal engineers.It's a one thing to research and improve the model, but if they ignore the ease of access and multi-availability of their models in different ways they are going to fall behind again.
sentences.zh: 停产的gemini-cli并引入了antigravity-cli，这是IMO的降级，他们越早与AWS合作并通过Bedrock发布gemini模型，拥有严格数据保护规则的企业/企业就越容易使用他们的模型并将其提供给内部工程师。研究和改进模型是一回事，但如果他们以不同的方式忽视模型的易于访问性和多可用性，他们将再次落后。

blocks.html_en:
So it's GLM-5.2 performance for almost twice the price.

That said, the speed looks really good. I think it's competitive with Fireworks's GLM 5.2 Fast, although Fireworks is still cheaper.

sentences.en: I think it's competitive with Fireworks's GLM 5.2 Fast, although Fireworks is still cheaper.
sentences.zh: 我认为它与 Fireworks 的 GLM 5.2 Fast 具有竞争力，尽管 Fireworks 仍然更便宜。

blocks.html_en:
LLM reception is truly extreme, even worse than AAA game releases.

Ever frontier lab lived it at least once : missing the frontier by a few months triggers extremly negative reactions, then you take back the lead for 2 weeks, and the hype cycle repeats.

sentences.en: LLM reception is truly extreme, even worse than AAA game releases.Ever frontier lab lived it at least once : missing the frontier by a few months triggers extremly negative reactions, then you take back the lead for 2 weeks, and the hype cycle repeats.
sentences.zh: LLM 的接受度确实是极端的，甚至比 AAA 游戏版本还要糟糕。任何前沿实验室都至少经历过一次：几个月错过前沿会引发极度负面的反应，然后你在两周内夺回领先地位，然后炒作周期就会重复。

blocks.html_en:
I spin a mental roulette on whether the reception on a new release will be "OMG best model by far, no one will be able to catch up for months!" or "OMG this is already outdated, RIP company X, they might as well just give up now, there's no coming back from this."

It's quite a fun game. I click into the comments and see if the roulette wheel was right.

sentences.en: I spin a mental roulette on whether the reception on a new release will be "OMG best model by far, no one will be able to catch up for months!"
sentences.zh: 我在心里盘算着新版本的反响是否会是“天啊，迄今为止最好的模式，几个月没人能赶上！”

sentences.en: or "OMG this is already outdated, RIP company X, they might as well just give up now, there's no coming back from this."It's quite a fun game.
sentences.zh: 或者“天哪，这已经过时了，安息吧 X 公司，他们最好现在就放弃，再也回不来了。”这是一个非常有趣的游戏。

sentences.en: I click into the comments and see if the roulette wheel was right.
sentences.zh: 我点击评论，看看轮盘赌是否正确。

blocks.html_en:
From my experience, this thing is crazy fast.

Spawn 10 on the same problem and have them debate to reach a consensus, you’ll get Fable-like results but 100x faster.

sentences.en: From my experience, this thing is crazy fast.Spawn 10 on the same problem and have them debate to reach a consensus, you’ll get Fable-like results but 100x faster.
sentences.zh: 根据我的经验，这件事太快了。在同一问题上生成 10 个人，让他们辩论以达成共识，你会得到类似寓言的结果，但速度快了 100 倍。

blocks.html_en: Kind of excited about this. 3.5 Flash on Antigravity has surprised me recently on a hobby project. When given opportunity to plan, it can deliver on tasks that would take me a while on my own and generates responses at blazing speeds - compared to what I'm used to at work with Opus 4.8 (granted I don't use Opus 4.8 on my hobby projects so just anecdotal). While with Gemini CLI I would just watch it run in circles and run out of 5h allowance before anything useful is produced (or even approached).

sentences.en: Kind of excited about this.
sentences.zh: 对此有点兴奋。

sentences.en: 3.5 Flash on Antigravity has surprised me recently on a hobby project.
sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash on Antigravity 最近在一个业余爱好项目中让我感到惊讶。

sentences.en: When given opportunity to plan, it can deliver on tasks that would take me a while on my own and generates responses at blazing speeds - compared to what I'm used to at work with Opus 4.8 (granted I don't use Opus 4.8 on my hobby projects so just anecdotal).
sentences.zh: 当有机会进行计划时，它可以完成那些需要我自己花一段时间的任务，并以极快的速度生成响应——与我习惯使用 Opus 4.8 工作相比（假设我不在我的爱好项目中使用 Opus 4.8，所以这只是轶事）。

sentences.en: While with Gemini CLI I would just watch it run in circles and run out of 5h allowance before anything useful is produced (or even approached).
sentences.zh: 当使用 Gemini CLI 时，我只会看着它绕圈运行，并在产生任何有用的东西（甚至接近）之前耗尽 5 小时的时间。

blocks.html_en: Kind of excited about this. 3.5 Flash on Antigravity has surprised me recently on a hobby project. When given opportunity to plan, it can deliver on tasks that would take me a while on my own and generates responses at blazing speeds - compared to what I'm used to at work with Opus 4.8 (granted I don't use Opus 4.8 on my hobby projects so just anecdotal). While with Gemini CLI I would just watch it run in circles and run out of 5h allowance before anything useful is produced (or even approached).

sentences.en: Kind of excited about this.
sentences.zh: 对此有点兴奋。

sentences.en: 3.5 Flash on Antigravity has surprised me recently on a hobby project.
sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash on Antigravity 最近在一个业余爱好项目中让我感到惊讶。

sentences.en: When given opportunity to plan, it can deliver on tasks that would take me a while on my own and generates responses at blazing speeds - compared to what I'm used to at work with Opus 4.8 (granted I don't use Opus 4.8 on my hobby projects so just anecdotal).
sentences.zh: 当有机会进行计划时，它可以完成那些需要我自己花一段时间的任务，并以极快的速度生成响应——与我习惯使用 Opus 4.8 工作相比（假设我不在我的爱好项目中使用 Opus 4.8，所以这只是轶事）。

sentences.en: While with Gemini CLI I would just watch it run in circles and run out of 5h allowance before anything useful is produced (or even approached).
sentences.zh: 当使用 Gemini CLI 时，我只会看着它绕圈运行，并在产生任何有用的东西（甚至接近）之前耗尽 5 小时的时间。

blocks.html_en:
Always happy to see new Gemini releases as IMO Antigravity Pro 16.67/mo plan (Annual) is still the best plan available and have been pretty happy with Antigravity IDE.

If it wasn't for Gemini/Antigravity I'd have to go with a Max Claude plan, as it stands now I can get by with just a Claude Pro plan to get Opus when I need it, whilst using Antigravity as my day-to-day workhorse.

Unfortunately Gemini Flash became too expensive to use as a general purpose model (i.e. for AI features in Apps), luckily there are plenty of cheaper Chinese models to fill that gap now.

sentences.en: Always happy to see new Gemini releases as IMO Antigravity Pro 16.67/mo plan (Annual) is still the best plan available and have been pretty happy with Antigravity IDE.If it wasn't for Gemini/Antigravity I'd have to go with a Max Claude plan, as it stands now I can get by with just a Claude Pro plan to get Opus when I need it, whilst using Antigravity as my day-to-day workhorse.Unfortunately Gemini Flash became too expensive to use as a general purpose model (i.e. for AI features in Apps), luckily there are plenty of cheaper Chinese models to fill that gap now.
sentences.zh: 总是很高兴看到新的 Gemini 版本，因为 IMO Antigravity Pro 16.67/mo 计划（年度）仍然是最好的可用计划，并且对 Antigravity IDE 非常满意。如果不是 Gemini/Antigravity，我就必须使用 Max Claude 计划，就目前情况而言，我只需使用 Claude Pro 计划即可在需要时获取 Opus，同时使用 Antigravity 作为我的日常工作不幸的是，Gemini Flash 变得太昂贵而无法用作通用模型（即应用程序中的 AI 功能），幸运的是，现在有很多更便宜的中国模型可以填补这一空白。

blocks.html_en:
Antigravity is now split into 2 Apps:

'Antigravity' which is an agent-first editor layout where you don't see your code and just prompt it.

'Antigravity IDE' which uses the Windsurf/VS Code editor, which is still what I primarily use in my day-to-day.

I hope they never retire the IDE, I don't think I can get used to prompting an AI Agent without being able to see my code to help workout what needs to be done.

sentences.en: Antigravity is now split into 2 Apps:'Antigravity' which is an agent-first editor layout where you don't see your code and just prompt it.'Antigravity IDE' which uses the Windsurf/VS Code editor, which is still what I primarily use in my day-to-day.I hope they never retire the IDE, I don't think I can get used to prompting an AI Agent without being able to see my code to help workout what needs to be done.
sentences.zh: Antigravity 现在分为 2 个应用程序：“Antigravity”，这是一个代理优先的编辑器布局，您看不到代码，只需提示它。“Antigravity IDE”使用 Windsurf/VS Code 编辑器，这仍然是我日常主要使用的编辑器。我希望他们永远不会淘汰 IDE，我认为我无法习惯在无法看到我的代码来帮助解决需要完成的事情的情况下提示 AI Agent。

> We have started our most ambitious pre-training run yet, for Gemini 4, and are excited by the progress.

blocks.html_en:
Spent half an hour just now benchmarking it against my current 3.5 Flash pipeline excited only see it regressed slightly (0.1% - 0.2% at most, for feature extraction work)

Seems like this is mostly a cost play by Google, hoping this doesn't bring 3.5 Flash capabilities to an end of life, and that 3.6 catches up or gets better.

sentences.en: Spent half an hour just now benchmarking it against my current 3.5 Flash pipeline excited only see it regressed slightly (0.1% - 0.2% at most, for feature extraction work)Seems like this is mostly a cost play by Google, hoping this doesn't bring 3.5 Flash capabilities to an end of life, and that 3.6 catches up or gets better.
sentences.zh: 刚刚花了半个小时将其与我当前的 3.5 Flash 管道进行基准测试，兴奋地只看到它略有下降（对于特征提取工作，最多 0.1% - 0.2%）似乎这主要是 Google 的成本游戏，希望这不会使 3.5 Flash 功能寿终正寝，而 3.6 会赶上或变得更好。

blocks.html_en: I often use Gemini free web chat because it's generally quite good at web search-related questions (apparently it has direct token-level access to the Google Search index) but I noticed in the last two weeks output quality of 3.5 Flash seriously degraded. Maybe they were switching over systems.

sentences.en: I often use Gemini free web chat because it's generally quite good at web search-related questions (apparently it has direct token-level access to the Google Search index) but I noticed in the last two weeks output quality of 3.5 Flash seriously degraded.
sentences.zh: 我经常使用 Gemini 免费网络聊天，因为它通常非常擅长解决与网络搜索相关的问题（显然它可以直接对 Google 搜索索引进行令牌级访问），但我注意到在过去两周中 3.5 Flash 的输出质量严重下降。

sentences.en: Maybe they were switching over systems.
sentences.zh: 也许他们正在切换系统。

blocks.html_en:
Because they don't have a lot of parameters to store general Wikipedia knowledge. They're small. Use big models that have high parameter capacity to store general information. Or build a harness around the small model that searches a knowledge base/internet.

Use the right tool for the job. It's like asking why a screwdriver isn't good at sawing wood, or calling C a terrible language because it's hard to make CRUD apps with it.

sentences.en: Because they don't have a lot of parameters to store general Wikipedia knowledge.
sentences.zh: 因为他们没有很多参数来存储一般的维基百科知识。

sentences.en: They're small.
sentences.zh: 它们很小。

sentences.en: Use big models that have high parameter capacity to store general information.
sentences.zh: 使用具有高参数容量的大模型来存储一般信息。

sentences.en: Or build a harness around the small model that searches a knowledge base/internet.Use the right tool for the job.
sentences.zh: 或者围绕搜索知识库/互联网的小模型构建一个工具。使用正确的工具来完成工作。

sentences.en: It's like asking why a screwdriver isn't good at sawing wood, or calling C a terrible language because it's hard to make CRUD apps with it.
sentences.zh: 这就像问为什么螺丝刀不擅长锯木头，或者说 C 语言是一种糟糕的语言，因为很难用它来制作 CRUD 应用程序。

blocks.html_en:
IMO Gemini has the best free tier models/app for everyday use. Muse-Spark is perhaps just slightly better, but has none of the connectivity to my GApps (for things like “create a recipe in my Google Docs from this image”).

Plus they are probably running these things on every Google search so saving tokens is a huge win for them.

sentences.en: IMO Gemini has the best free tier models/app for everyday use.
sentences.zh: IMO Gemini 拥有适合日常使用的最佳免费层模型/应用程序。

sentences.en: Muse-Spark is perhaps just slightly better, but has none of the connectivity to my GApps (for things like “create a recipe in my Google Docs from this image”).Plus they are probably running these things on every Google search so saving tokens is a huge win for them.
sentences.zh: Muse-Spark 可能只是稍微好一点，但没有与我的 GApps 的连接（对于诸如“根据此图像在我的 Google 文档中创建菜谱”之类的事情）。此外，他们可能在每次 Google 搜索上运行这些东西，因此保存令牌对他们来说是一个巨大的胜利。

blocks.html_en:
Free plan, the default tier without requiring a subscription. If you use through the Gemini App or gemini.google without paying anything, the model used is 3.6 Flash.

Rankings for text are here https://arena.ai/leaderboard/text

For comparison of Free Tiers: - Gemini serves 3.6-flash (rank 12) - ChatGPT serves 5.5-Instant (rank 23) - Claude serves Sonnet 5 (rank 27) - Meta AI serves muse-spark-1.1 (rank 5)

While Meta AI serves the better ranked model, it doesn't end up working that well for other things. For example, if I ask "help me buy a new raincoat", it ends up suggesting a Cambodian website, whereas Google is well integrated with Google shopping. It doesn't have the same integration with GApps outside of Gmail/Calendar. A few other email connectors are available.

Claude has one of the best interfaces with connectors, skills, and plugins galore, but the model and limits are restrictive on the free tier.

Gemini, as far as I know, I've never hit a rate limit on Flash.

I believe Gemini is going to gain market share through the free tier funnel while serving models as cost-effectively as possible. People are going to use Gemini because they use GApps and Google.

ChatGPT and Anthropic are going to be competing for the API/Business users, but for everyone else they are going have to become Google before Google becomes them.

sentences.en: Free plan, the default tier without requiring a subscription.
sentences.zh: 免费计划，默认套餐，无需订阅。

sentences.en: If you use through the Gemini App or gemini.google without paying anything, the model used is 3.6 Flash.Rankings for text are here https://arena.ai/leaderboard/textFor comparison of Free Tiers: - Gemini serves 3.6-flash (rank 12) - ChatGPT serves 5.5-Instant (rank 23) - Claude serves Sonnet 5 (rank 27) - Meta AI serves muse-spark-1.1 (rank 5)While Meta AI serves the better ranked model, it doesn't end up working that well for other things.
sentences.zh: 如果您通过 Gemini 应用程序或 gemini.google 无需支付任何费用即可使用，则使用的模型为 3.6 Flash。文本排名位于 https://arena.ai/leaderboard/text 对于免费等级的比较： - Gemini 提供 3.6-flash（排名 12） - ChatGPT 提供 5.5-Instant（排名 23） - Claude 提供 Sonnet 5（排名 27） - Meta AI 提供 muse-spark-1.1 （排名 5）虽然 Meta AI 服务于排名较好的模型，但它最终在其他方面的表现却不佳。

sentences.en: For example, if I ask "help me buy a new raincoat", it ends up suggesting a Cambodian website, whereas Google is well integrated with Google shopping.
sentences.zh: 例如，如果我问“帮我买一件新雨衣”，它最终会建议一个柬埔寨网站，而谷歌与谷歌购物集成得很好。

sentences.en: It doesn't have the same integration with GApps outside of Gmail/Calendar.
sentences.zh: 它没有与 Gmail/日历之外的 GApp 进行相同的集成。

sentences.en: A few other email connectors are available.Claude has one of the best interfaces with connectors, skills, and plugins galore, but the model and limits are restrictive on the free tier.Gemini, as far as I know, I've never hit a rate limit on Flash.I believe Gemini is going to gain market share through the free tier funnel while serving models as cost-effectively as possible.
sentences.zh: 还有其他一些电子邮件连接器可用。Claude 拥有最好的接口之一，具有丰富的连接器、技能和插件，但模型和限制在免费层上受到限制。Gemini，据我所知，我从未达到过 Flash 的速率限制。我相信 Gemini 将通过免费层渠道获得市场份额，同时尽可能经济高效地为模型提供服务。

sentences.en: People are going to use Gemini because they use GApps and Google.ChatGPT and Anthropic are going to be competing for the API/Business users, but for everyone else they are going have to become Google before Google becomes them.
sentences.zh: 人们将使用 Gemini，因为他们使用 GApps 和 Google。ChatGPT 和 Anthropic 将争夺 API/商业用户，但对于其他人来说，他们必须在 Google 成为他们之前成为 Google。

sentences.zh: Claude 拥有最好的界面之一，具有丰富的连接器、技能和插件，但模型和限制在免费层上受到限制。

blocks.html_en: Gemini, as far as I know, I've never hit a rate limit on Flash.

sentences.en: Gemini, as far as I know, I've never hit a rate limit on Flash.
sentences.zh: Gemini，据我所知，我从未达到过 Flash 的速率限制。

blocks.html_en: I believe Gemini is going to gain market share through the free tier funnel while serving models as cost-effectively as possible. People are going to use Gemini because they use GApps and Google.

sentences.en: I believe Gemini is going to gain market share through the free tier funnel while serving models as cost-effectively as possible.
sentences.zh: 我相信 Gemini 将通过免费渠道获得市场份额，同时尽可能经济高效地为模型提供服务。

sentences.en: People are going to use Gemini because they use GApps and Google.
sentences.zh: 人们会使用 Gemini，因为他们使用 GApps 和 Google。

blocks.html_en: ChatGPT and Anthropic are going to be competing for the API/Business users, but for everyone else they are going have to become Google before Google becomes them.

sentences.en: ChatGPT and Anthropic are going to be competing for the API/Business users, but for everyone else they are going have to become Google before Google becomes them.
sentences.zh: ChatGPT 和 Anthropic 将争夺 API/商业用户，但对于其他所有人来说，他们必须在 Google 成为他们之前成为 Google。

blocks.html_en:
So 3.6 Flash is a somewhat of an admission that Google miscalculated by charging 3-5x for 3.5 Flash what it did for 3.0 Flash (3x input and output costs plus large token inefficiency changes) despite only modest improvements?

3.5 Flash Lite is only a hair cheaper than 3.0 Flash, but I think 3.0 Flash is a massively more capable model?

sentences.en: So 3.6 Flash is a somewhat of an admission that Google miscalculated by charging 3-5x for 3.5 Flash what it did for 3.0 Flash (3x input and output costs plus large token inefficiency changes) despite only modest improvements?3.5 Flash Lite is only a hair cheaper than 3.0 Flash, but I think 3.0 Flash is a massively more capable model?
sentences.zh: 因此，3.6 Flash 在某种程度上承认 Google 计算错误，对 3.5 Flash 的收费是 3.0 Flash 的 3-5 倍（3 倍的输入和输出成本加上巨大的代币效率低下的变化），尽管只有适度的改进？3.5 Flash Lite 只比 3.0 Flash 便宜一点点，但我认为 3.0 Flash 是一个功能更强大的模型？

blocks.html_en: It does seem like their releases are getting closer together. I get the feeling they realized they were trying to roll out to their entire ecosystem and now they’re focusing more just directly on the AI model itself. I think give it a little time and they’ll start to be one of the competitors too.

sentences.en: It does seem like their releases are getting closer together.
sentences.zh: 看起来他们的发布确实越来越接近。

sentences.en: I get the feeling they realized they were trying to roll out to their entire ecosystem and now they’re focusing more just directly on the AI model itself.
sentences.zh: 我感觉他们意识到他们正在尝试推广到整个生态系统，而现在他们更直接地关注人工智能模型本身。

sentences.en: I think give it a little time and they’ll start to be one of the competitors too.
sentences.zh: 我想给它一点时间，他们也会开始成为竞争对手之一。

Here's the issue:

GLM 5.2 is better, also cheaper, and almost as fast.

So essentially, a big L for Google. Combine this with them not being able to produce a frontier model this generation... hmm implications

sentences.zh: 再加上他们无法生产这一代的前沿模型......

blocks.html_en:
Counter-point, cost per task is almost the same ($0.47 vs $0.50) between GLM 5.2 and Gemini 3.6 Flash. [0] Not to mention the subscription plans likely produce 10x value compared to GLM 5.2 API, unsure the rate limits on a equal subscription vs subscription, but Google subscriptions offer tons of other value, including 1 year of Free Gemini for Education accounts.

[1] https://artificialanalysis.ai/models/gemini-3-6-flash

sentences.en: Counter-point, cost per task is almost the same ($0.47 vs $0.50) between GLM 5.2 and Gemini 3.6 Flash. [0] Not to mention the subscription plans likely produce 10x value compared to GLM 5.2 API, unsure the rate limits on a equal subscription vs subscription, but Google subscriptions offer tons of other value, including 1 year of Free Gemini for Education accounts.[1] https://artificialanalysis.ai/models/gemini-3-6-flash
sentences.zh: 相反，GLM 5.2 和 Gemini 3.6 Flash 之间的每个任务成本几乎相同（0.47 美元 vs 0.50 美元）。 [0] 更不用说与 GLM 5.2 API 相比，订阅计划可能会产生 10 倍的价值，不确定同等订阅与订阅的速率限制，但 Google 订阅提供了大量其他价值，包括 1 年免费 Gemini 教育帐户。[1] https://artificialanalysis.ai/models/gemini-3-6-flash

blocks.html_en:
"..and in some benchmarks like DeepSWE by Datacurve, we observe up to 65%, all at a lower cost per output token."

"3.6 Flash delivers higher precision with fewer unwanted code edits and reduced execution loops, as seen in DeepSWE (49% vs. 37%)"

So which one is it? 65% or 49%?

sentences.en: "..and in some benchmarks like DeepSWE by Datacurve, we observe up to 65%, all at a lower cost per output token.""3.6 Flash delivers higher precision with fewer unwanted code edits and reduced execution loops, as seen in DeepSWE (49% vs. 37%)"So which one is it?
sentences.zh: “..在 Datacurve 的 DeepSWE 等一些基准测试中，我们观察到高达 65%，而且每个输出令牌的成本都较低。”“3.6 Flash 提供了更高的精度，减少了不需要的代码编辑并减少了执行循环，如 DeepSWE 中所示（49% 与 37%）”那么它是哪一个呢？

blocks.html_en:
A lot of disappointment here in the comments, but models like these aren't meant to compete with the likes of Fable or GPT 5.6.

I use 3.1 Flash Lite regularly to classify listings on eCommerce websites. It's great for this task - fast, cheap and accurate.

In fact, it was the single best model we tried in terms of the speed vs accuracy vs price tradeoffs - including the Chinese models.

Of course, 3.5 Flash was more accurate but the 5x cost increase couldn't be justified.

3.5 Flash Lite sounds like it could be a strict upgrade for our use case, without a significant increase in costs or drop in speed.

It's not GPT-6 but it's not trying to be. It's a completely different tool and great at what it does.

sentences.en: A lot of disappointment here in the comments, but models like these aren't meant to compete with the likes of Fable or GPT 5.6.I use 3.1 Flash Lite regularly to classify listings on eCommerce websites.
sentences.zh: 评论中有很多令人失望的地方，但像这样的模型并不意味着与 Fable 或 GPT 5.6 等模型竞争。我经常使用 3.1 Flash Lite 对电子商务网站上的列表进行分类。

sentences.en: It's great for this task - fast, cheap and accurate.In fact, it was the single best model we tried in terms of the speed vs accuracy vs price tradeoffs - including the Chinese models.Of course, 3.5 Flash was more accurate but the 5x cost increase couldn't be justified.3.5 Flash Lite sounds like it could be a strict upgrade for our use case, without a significant increase in costs or drop in speed.It's not GPT-6 but it's not trying to be.
sentences.zh: 它非常适合这项任务 - 快速、便宜且准确。事实上，就速度、准确性和价格权衡而言，它是我们尝试过的最好的型号 - 包括中国型号。当然，3.5 Flash 更准确，但成本增加 5 倍是不合理的。3.5 Flash Lite 听起来像是对我们的用例的严格升级，不会显着增加成本或降低速度。它不是 GPT-6，但它并不想这样做。

sentences.en: It's a completely different tool and great at what it does.
sentences.zh: 这是一个完全不同的工具，并且非常擅长它的功能。

blocks.html_en: Models are expensive and low performance. On top of that they make you jump through hoops to even use these models without being throttled even for the weaker models. The only reason we are using them is credits. As soon as credits run out we are switching immediately.

sentences.en: Models are expensive and low performance.
sentences.zh: 模型价格昂贵且性能低下。

sentences.en: On top of that they make you jump through hoops to even use these models without being throttled even for the weaker models.
sentences.zh: 最重要的是，它们让你跳过障碍甚至使用这些模型而不会受到限制，即使对于较弱的模型也是如此。

sentences.en: The only reason we are using them is credits.
sentences.zh: 我们使用它们的唯一原因是积分。

sentences.en: As soon as credits run out we are switching immediately.
sentences.zh: 一旦积分用完，我们就会立即切换。

blocks.html_en: It feels like AI is going to be the end of Google. The post-Schmidt company culture cannot produce consistent, consumer-friendly products that any sane person would want to use consistently.

sentences.en: It feels like AI is going to be the end of Google.
sentences.zh: 感觉人工智能将是谷歌的终结。

sentences.en: The post-Schmidt company culture cannot produce consistent, consumer-friendly products that any sane person would want to use consistently.
sentences.zh: 后施密特时代的公司文化无法生产出任何理智的人都愿意持续使用的一致的、消费者友好的产品。

blocks.html_en:
"The model will be exclusively available to governments and trusted partners via CodeMender soon as part of a limited-access pilot program"

we are stealing plutocracy from the jaws of emancipation.

i don't want to live in a world where abundance is guarded and shared among politicians and cronies, whilst the rest are left to rot.

sentences.en: "The model will be exclusively available to governments and trusted partners via CodeMender soon as part of a limited-access pilot program"we are stealing plutocracy from the jaws of emancipation.i don't want to live in a world where abundance is guarded and shared among politicians and cronies, whilst the rest are left to rot.
sentences.zh: “作为有限访问试点计划的一部分，该模型将很快通过 CodeMender 专门提供给政府和值得信赖的合作伙伴。”我们正在从解放的嘴里窃取富豪统治。我不想生活在一个富足被政客和亲信守护和分享的世界，而其余的则任其腐烂。

blocks.html_en: I think it’s safe to say Google seems a bit out of the top AI competition now. The “cyber” stuff also starts to become laughable with open models providing the full power without the crap Anthropic, Google, OpenAI are trying to frontload on you(I.e you are not allowed to develop/review a login system, pay a special cyber operation team to do it for you). They really deserve to become irrelevant in the future of AI.

sentences.en: I think it’s safe to say Google seems a bit out of the top AI competition now.
sentences.zh: 我认为可以肯定地说，谷歌现在似乎有点退出了顶级人工智能竞争。

sentences.en: The “cyber” stuff also starts to become laughable with open models providing the full power without the crap Anthropic, Google, OpenAI are trying to frontload on you(I.e you are not allowed to develop/review a login system, pay a special cyber operation team to do it for you).
sentences.zh: “网络”的东西也开始变得可笑，因为开放模型提供了全部功能，而没有垃圾 Anthropic、谷歌、OpenAI 试图预先加载到你身上（即你不允许开发/审查登录系统，请支付一个特殊的网络运营团队来为你做这件事）。

sentences.en: They really deserve to become irrelevant in the future of AI.
sentences.zh: 他们确实应该在人工智能的未来中变得无关紧要。

blocks.html_en:
Well, you can use the google models from Pi. Go to aistudio.google.com and set up an API key. There is a free quota, it's relatively large for the Flash Lite models.

...and last time I looked the limits were more generous for Gemma 4 there, but they have been tightened a bit. That's how it goes, always changing.

blocks.html_en:
The silence is deafening.

Google watches over the last few months a flat out assault on the Pareto curve from American and Chinese companies. Release after release pushing the boundaries of frontier intelligence and price/performance.

And the response from arguably the biggest AI research labs in the world by headcount is Flash 3.6.

What do you do when you are given essentially unlimited resources and still find yourself falling behind?

sentences.en: The silence is deafening.Google watches over the last few months a flat out assault on the Pareto curve from American and Chinese companies.

blocks.html_en:
The silence is deafening.

Google watches over the last few months a flat out assault on the Pareto curve from American and Chinese companies. Release after release pushing the boundaries of frontier intelligence and price/performance.

And the response from arguably the biggest AI research labs in the world by headcount is Flash 3.6.

What do you do when you are given essentially unlimited resources and still find yourself falling behind?

blocks.html_en:
Gemini 3.5 flash is already a pretty good model. But, unfortunately, the primary way you can interact with it for coding is through Antigravity - which is actively developer hostile.

It doesn't matter how good the model is if you're (mostly) forced to use it in Antigravity - which turns any model into crap.

Wake me up when Antigravity doesn't suck.

sentences.en: Gemini 3.5 flash is already a pretty good model.
sentences.zh: Gemini 3.5闪光灯已经是一个相当不错的型号了。

sentences.en: But, unfortunately, the primary way you can interact with it for coding is through Antigravity - which is actively developer hostile.It doesn't matter how good the model is if you're (mostly) forced to use it in Antigravity - which turns any model into crap.Wake me up when Antigravity doesn't suck.
sentences.zh: 但是，不幸的是，你与它交互进行编码的主要方式是通过反重力 - 这对开发人员来说是积极敌对的。如果你（大部分）被迫在反重力中使用它，那么模型有多好并不重要 - 这会将任何模型变成垃圾。当反重力不糟糕时叫醒我。

blocks.html_en:
We're almost five years into the whole GenAI thing and we're still relying on these guys to spoonfeed us incremental updates.

It's time for them to start focusing on open-weight models and efficiency. Otherwise there's just a layer of marketing hype and "will it do this?" that has to be cut through for evaluation of each and every release cycle.

Models are getting easier and easier to create. The money, if there's any here, is in the harness the user interfaces with, and the data centers running them.

sentences.en: We're almost five years into the whole GenAI thing and we're still relying on these guys to spoonfeed us incremental updates.It's time for them to start focusing on open-weight models and efficiency.
sentences.zh: 我们对 GenAI 的研究已经快五年了，我们仍然依赖这些人来给我们提供增量更新。现在是他们开始关注开放权重模型和效率的时候了。

sentences.zh: 必须对每个发布周期进行评估。模型的创建变得越来越容易。

sentences.zh: 资金（如果有的话）是在用户界面的设备以及运行它们的数据中心中。

blocks.html_en:
> What the hell is going on over there

Google was late to coding agents and as-per-usual fucked it up with their crazy project management culture.

Usually Google gets away with it due to inertia, however this time they are paying a heavy price because they missed out on the training data that Anthropic and OpenAI have gathered with claude and codex.

sentences.en: > What the hell is going on over thereGoogle was late to coding agents and as-per-usual fucked it up with their crazy project management culture.Usually Google gets away with it due to inertia, however this time they are paying a heavy price because they missed out on the training data that Anthropic and OpenAI have gathered with claude and codex.
sentences.zh: > 那边到底发生了什么谷歌对编码代理迟到了，并且像往常一样用他们疯狂的项目管理文化搞砸了。谷歌通常会因为惯性而侥幸逃脱，但这一次他们付出了沉重的代价，因为他们错过了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 通过克劳德和 Codex 收集的训练数据。

blocks.html_en:
I keep saying this and people dont believe me, but I have b2b saas systems with actual agents running around the clock, and the performance/stability of the flash model is higher than most other models.

Meaning, its predictable with tool calls, wont spin off a million tools/do weird behavior, its reasonable. Even sonnet in a real world decision making scenario is not reliable, or will reason so long its incredibly expensive.

The benchmarks arent catching all the value, and most people have never actually ran an ai agent in a real context that matters

sentences.en: I keep saying this and people dont believe me, but I have b2b saas systems with actual agents running around the clock, and the performance/stability of the flash model is higher than most other models.Meaning, its predictable with tool calls, wont spin off a million tools/do weird behavior, its reasonable.
sentences.zh: 我一直这么说，人们不相信我，但我有 B2B saas 系统，实际代理全天候运行，并且闪存模型的性能/稳定性高于大多数其他模型。意思是，它可以通过工具调用进行预测，不会派生出一百万个工具/做奇怪的行为，这是合理的。

sentences.en: Even sonnet in a real world decision making scenario is not reliable, or will reason so long its incredibly expensive.The benchmarks arent catching all the value, and most people have never actually ran an ai agent in a real context that matters
sentences.zh: 即使是十四行诗在现实世界的决策场景中也是不可靠的，或者说它的成本非常昂贵。基准测试并没有捕捉到所有的价值，而且大多数人从未在重要的真实环境中实际运行过人工智能代理
